name: Tvp® Shepherds Pie
recipeIngredient: 1-1/2 lb root veg (I used leeks, turnips, and carrot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Peel potatoes and put them in a pot of boiling water.
3. Empty tomatoes into a saucepan, add TVP®. Bring to boil and reduce to simmer.
4. Add Worcester sauce and herbs.
5. Peel vegetables and put them in a pot of lightly salted water. Cook until tender.
6. Add tomato puree to the TVP® mixture.
7. When the vegetables are cooked, add them to the TVP® mixture (you may use some of the cooking liquid if the TVP® is getting dry).
8. Mash the potatoes with a generous splash of milk or your usual milk substitute. Sprinkle in the nutritional yeast flakes and add more milk if needed. Stir until you have a sloppy yellow, goopy mixture.
9. When the TVP® mixture is ready, pour it into a suitable container. Spread the mashed potatoes on top.
10. Put the assembled pie in the oven and bake for about 30 minutes, or until the potato topping is slightly puffed up and browned on top. If not browning enough, place under a hot grill.
